examples: Once again he had to readjust to living alone.
Children are highly adaptable—they just need time to readjust.
I can understand why astronauts find it difficult to readjust to life on earth.
Dates usually kick off the feast, since the sugar- and vitamin-rich fruit helps your stomach readjust to eating.
Rankin's first shot curled narrowly wide, while the second was deflected, forcing Davis to readjust his position quickly.
